column1: #note: material = CU or AL. A feeder that fits in ONE capped-copper run is sized in CU; a feeder that
#note: needs MULTIPLE parallel runs defaults to AL (see *ofeed-parallel-material* / *ofeed-max-cond*).
#note: Each material's rows MUST stay in ASCENDING ampacity order -- the sizer takes the first that carries the load.
#note: VERIFY the aluminum r_ohm_kft / area_in2 against your NEC copy before relying on VD / fill.
